A.J. Dybantsa was exceptional at getting to the FT line in college and it carried over to the Summer League. What makes him so good and why it could be important for the Wizards: www.monumentalsportsnetwork.com/article/aj-d...

media.title: AJ Dybantsa shows rare ability to draw fouls
media.description: AJ. Dybantsa could end up being one of the best players in the NBA at getting to the free throw line. We saw that in the Summer League.

items.title: NEW PODCAST:
items.author: Richard Deitsch
items.body_excerpt:
NEW PODCAST: 
The guests are @donnovanbennett.bsky.social and Arash Madani of CBC Sports. The topics? What the ESPN layoffs mean, the collapse of the Blue Jays and will the World Cup produce more viewership interest in soccer in North America. 

LISTEN: swap.fm/l/4apy5A6Fma...

items.title: NEW #CashConsiderations with @rickyodonn.bsky.social with Summer League wrap-up. Not much more to say about Caleb, who rules, but a lot about the bizarre handling of Noa Essengue and just how bad Dailyn Swain was. What the heck happened?!
